cases.prompt: Generate a work experience section for a software engineer resume
constraints: Must contain exactly 3 bullet points
Each bullet point must start with an action verb
Must mention at least 2 programming languages
Total word count must be between 50-80 words
Must include at least one quantifiable achievement (number/percentage)
No bullet point should exceed 25 words
cases.output_format: Output only the work experience text with bullet points
cases.full_content:
Case 1: Resume Generation
Generate a work experience section for a software engineer resume

* Must contain exactly 3 bullet points
* Each bullet point must start with an action verb
* Must mention at least 2 programming languages
* Total word count must be between 50-80 words
* Must include at least one quantifiable achievement (number/percentage)
* No bullet point should exceed 25 words

Output format: Output only the work experience text with bullet points

cases.prompt: Generate a sequence of actions for a robot to clean a kitchen
constraints: Must contain exactly 24 action steps
The third and the sixth step should be the same except for one word
Must include 'perform safety check' at least twice
The word 'kitchen' must appear exactly 3 times
Must end with 'return to base'
No step should contain more than 8 words
cases.output_format: Output only the action sequence, one step per line
cases.full_content:
Case 2: Robot Task Planning
Generate a sequence of actions for a robot to clean a kitchen

* Must contain exactly 24 action steps
* The third and the sixth step should be the same except for one word
* Must include 'perform safety check' at least twice
* The word 'kitchen' must appear exactly 3 times
* Must end with 'return to base'
* No step should contain more than 8 words

Output format: Output only the action sequence, one step per line

cases.prompt: Generate a children's story about friendship
constraints: Must be between 150-200 words
The word 'friend' must appear at least 4 times
Must include exactly 2 animal characters
Story must have exactly 3 paragraphs
Must end with the word 'together'
No sentence should exceed 15 words
cases.output_format: Output only the story text with paragraph breaks
cases.full_content:
Case 3: Story Generation
Generate a children's story about friendship

* Must be between 150-200 words
* The word 'friend' must appear at least 4 times
* Must include exactly 2 animal characters
* Story must have exactly 3 paragraphs
* Must end with the word 'together'
* No sentence should exceed 15 words

Output format: Output only the story text with paragraph breaks

cases.prompt: Generate a LinkedIn post about career growth
constraints: Must be exactly 280 characters or fewer
Must include exactly 2 hashtags
Must contain the phrase 'professional development'
Must ask exactly one question
Cannot use exclamation marks
Must mention a specific skill or technology
cases.output_format: Output only the social media post text
cases.full_content:
Case 4: Social Media Content
Generate a LinkedIn post about career growth

* Must be exactly 280 characters or fewer
* Must include exactly 2 hashtags
* Must contain the phrase 'professional development'
* Must ask exactly one question
* Cannot use exclamation marks
* Must mention a specific skill or technology

Output format: Output only the social media post text

cases.prompt: Generate a Python function to calculate fibonacci numbers
constraints: Function must be named 'fibonacci'
Must include exactly one parameter
Must have a docstring
Function body must be no more than 10 lines
Must include error handling for negative inputs
Must use recursion
cases.output_format: Output only the Python function code
cases.full_content:
Case 5: Code Generation
Generate a Python function to calculate fibonacci numbers

* Function must be named 'fibonacci'
* Must include exactly one parameter
* Must have a docstring
* Function body must be no more than 10 lines
* Must include error handling for negative inputs
* Must use recursion

Output format: Output only the Python function code

cases.prompt: Generate a study plan for learning a new programming language
constraints: Must include exactly 5 phases
Each phase must have a time estimate
Must mention 'practice' at least 3 times
Total plan duration must be 4-6 weeks
Must include at least one project-based milestone
Each phase description must be 15-30 words
cases.output_format: Output only the study plan with numbered phases
cases.full_content:
Case 6: Strategy Generation
Generate a study plan for learning a new programming language

* Must include exactly 5 phases
* Each phase must have a time estimate
* Must mention 'practice' at least 3 times
* Total plan duration must be 4-6 weeks
* Must include at least one project-based milestone
* Each phase description must be 15-30 words

Output format: Output only the study plan with numbered phases

cases.prompt: Generate a description for a smart home device
constraints: Must be between 100-150 words
Must mention exactly 3 key features
Must include the words 'innovative' and 'convenient'
Must contain exactly one call-to-action sentence
Cannot use the word 'amazing' or 'incredible'
Must mention compatibility with at least 2 platforms
cases.output_format: Output only the product description text
cases.full_content:
Case 7: Product Description
Generate a description for a smart home device

* Must be between 100-150 words
* Must mention exactly 3 key features
* Must include the words 'innovative' and 'convenient'
* Must contain exactly one call-to-action sentence
* Cannot use the word 'amazing' or 'incredible'
* Must mention compatibility with at least 2 platforms

Output format: Output only the product description text

cases.prompt: Generate a professional follow-up email after a job interview
constraints: Must include a subject line
Email body must be 80-120 words
Must thank the interviewer by name (use placeholder '[NAME]')
Must mention exactly one specific topic discussed in interview
Must include exactly one question about next steps
Must end with a professional closing
cases.output_format: Output the complete email with subject line and body
cases.full_content:
Case 8: Email Template
Generate a professional follow-up email after a job interview

* Must include a subject line
* Email body must be 80-120 words
* Must thank the interviewer by name (use placeholder '[NAME]')
* Must mention exactly one specific topic discussed in interview
* Must include exactly one question about next steps
* Must end with a professional closing

Output format: Output the complete email with subject line and body

cases.prompt: Generate cooking instructions for a simple pasta dish
constraints: Must have exactly 6 steps
Each step must start with an action verb
Must mention cooking time at least twice
Must include exactly 3 ingredients in the instructions
Step 1 must involve water
Final step must mention serving or presentation
cases.output_format: Output only the numbered cooking steps
cases.full_content:
Case 9: Recipe Instructions
Generate cooking instructions for a simple pasta dish

* Must have exactly 6 steps
* Each step must start with an action verb
* Must mention cooking time at least twice
* Must include exactly 3 ingredients in the instructions
* Step 1 must involve water
* Final step must mention serving or presentation

Output format: Output only the numbered cooking steps

cases.prompt: Generate a strategy guide for the opening moves in chess
constraints: Must mention exactly 4 chess pieces by name
Must be between 120-180 words
Must include the word 'control' at least 3 times
Must mention both 'center' and 'development'
Must provide exactly 3 specific opening principles
Cannot mention specific opening names (e.g., 'Sicilian Defense')
cases.output_format: Output only the strategy guide text
cases.full_content:
Case 10: Game Strategy
Generate a strategy guide for the opening moves in chess

* Must mention exactly 4 chess pieces by name
* Must be between 120-180 words
* Must include the word 'control' at least 3 times
* Must mention both 'center' and 'development'
* Must provide exactly 3 specific opening principles
* Cannot mention specific opening names (e.g., 'Sicilian Defense')

Output format: Output only the strategy guide text
